problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
